title: D3ATH SMP
description: Exact 1.20.1 replica of Death SMP: 275+ mods for epic magic bosses, Marvel/DC heroes, quests, loot hunts, and mayhem across 80+ dimensions Live Laugh Love!
body: Death SMP is a modpack built around the power and chaos of the Infinity Gauntlet. The pack creates a competitive survival world where players must gather resources, explore dangerous dimensions, and fight for control of powerful artifacts. Each stone changes how players interact with the world, adding new risks, rewards, and late-game challenges. This pack is designed for servers and provides a fast, intense gameplay loop focused on PvP, strategy, and progression...
